place.summary: Tai Mo Shan functions primarily as a connector in Hong Kong's visitor network. Its strongest observed source market is PH. It receives notable inbound connections from Po Lin Monastery. Visitors often continue to Po Lin Monastery. It performs above its category average on observed experience.

opportunity_cards.title: Frequent companion: Po Lin Monastery
opportunity_cards.detail: Tai Mo Shan frequently appears alongside Po Lin Monastery, suggesting cross-promotion or route packaging potential.

opportunity_cards.title: Strong onward link to Hong Kong Disneyland
opportunity_cards.detail: Visitors often continue from Tai Mo Shan to Hong Kong Disneyland, with relatively strong journey experience.
